name: Lipofection Transfection Protocol

components.name: 1. 转染前一天铺板 (60–80% 汇合度)
2. 管 A: 质粒 DNA in Opti-MEM
6. 6–8 h 后换新鲜完全培养基

notes.en: siRNA: 25–50 pmol per well + 5 µL Lipo RNAiMAX. Switching to serum-free medium before transfection improves efficiency.
notes.zh: siRNA 转染: 每孔 25–50 pmol siRNA + 5 µL Lipo RNAiMAX。转染前换无血清培养基效果更好。DNA:Lipo 比例需优化 (1:2–1:4)。

ref: Dalby et al. (2004) Methods 33:95–103; Thermo Fisher Lipofectamine Protocol

briefSteps.en: Plate cells day before → prepare DNA/Lipofectamine in Opti-MEM separately → mix and incubate 15–20 min → add complex dropwise to cells → replace medium after 6–8 h → harvest at 24–72 h
briefSteps.zh: 前一天铺板 → 分别在 Opti-MEM 中稀释 DNA 和 Lipofectamine → 混合孵育 15–20 min → 逐滴加入细胞 → 6–8 h 后换液 → 24–72 h 后检测表达

detailedSteps.en: Day −1: Seed cells in antibiotic-free complete medium in a 6-well plate (~3–5×10⁵ cells/well) to reach 60–80% confluency by next day.
detailedSteps.zh: 前一天（Day −1）：在不含抗生素的完全培养基中将细胞接种至 6 孔板（约 3–5×10⁵ 个/孔），使次日汇合度达 60–80%。

detailedSteps.en: Day 0 — Tube A: Dilute 2.5 µg plasmid DNA (per well) in 125 µL Opti-MEM; mix gently. For siRNA: use 25–50 pmol siRNA in 125 µL Opti-MEM.
detailedSteps.zh: Day 0 — 管 A：将 2.5 µg 质粒 DNA（每孔）稀释至 125 µL Opti-MEM，轻柔混匀。siRNA 转染：25–50 pmol siRNA 稀释至 125 µL Opti-MEM。

detailedSteps.en: Tube B: Dilute 7.5 µL Lipofectamine 2000 (or 3000) in 125 µL Opti-MEM; mix gently and incubate 5 min at room temperature.
detailedSteps.zh: 管 B：将 7.5 µL Lipofectamine 2000（或 3000）稀释至 125 µL Opti-MEM，轻混后室温孵育 5 min。

detailedSteps.en: Combine Tube A and Tube B; mix gently by pipetting 3–5 times; incubate the combined mixture at room temperature for 15–20 min to form lipoplexes.
detailedSteps.zh: 将管 A 和管 B 混合，轻柔吹打 3–5 次，室温孵育 15–20 min 形成脂质复合物。

detailedSteps.en: Optional: Replace cell medium with 1.5 mL fresh Opti-MEM (serum-free) per well immediately before adding the complex to improve efficiency.
detailedSteps.zh: 可选：加入复合物前立即将细胞培养基换成每孔 1.5 mL 新鲜 Opti-MEM（无血清），以提高转染效率。

detailedSteps.en: Add the 250 µL lipoplex complex dropwise to each well; gently rock the plate to distribute evenly. Incubate at 37°C, 5% CO₂.
detailedSteps.zh: 将 250 µL 脂质复合物逐滴加入每孔，轻柔晃动培养板使其均匀分布，37°C、5% CO₂ 孵育。

detailedSteps.en: After 6–8 h, replace the medium with fresh complete medium (with antibiotics and serum) to reduce lipofection toxicity.
detailedSteps.zh: 6–8 h 后，换成含抗生素和血清的新鲜完全培养基，以减少脂质体转染毒性。

detailedSteps.en: Assess transfection efficiency at 24 h (e.g., GFP fluorescence, reporter assay) and harvest cells at 24–72 h post-transfection depending on the protein turnover rate.
detailedSteps.zh: 转染后 24 h 评估转染效率（如 GFP 荧光、报告基因检测），根据蛋白周转速率在 24–72 h 收获细胞。

note.en: Cells plate overnight to reach optimal confluency; proceed next morning
note.zh: 细胞过夜铺板至最佳汇合度；次日早上继续

note.en: After replacing media, cells incubate 24–72 h for expression; harvest time is flexible
note.zh: 换液后细胞孵育 24–72 h 待表达；收获时间灵活

usage.en: Introduce exogenous DNA or RNA into mammalian cells using lipid-based transfection.
usage.zh: 脂质体法将外源 DNA 或 RNA 导入哺乳动物细胞。
